completed: Disabled Employee ID login for faculty
Standardized temporary password generation to 8-character hex strings
Implemented automatic input trimming for faculty registration
Implemented Range-Based Roll Number Expansion (e.g. 21A91A0501-10) for Mentor and Elective imports
Enhanced Import Preview UI with expansion badges and landscape support
pending: Recent Activity Feed implementation on Admin dashboard
Subject structure logic for 'Clone Class' functionality

decisions.context: Bulk assignments for subjects/mentors are tedious when done row-by-row for large batches.
decisions.decision: Added range-based expansion logic (01-10, 098 to 102) with a 100-student cap per row.
decisions.trade_offs: Adds complexity to import controllers but significantly reduces admin manual labor.
